last_reflection: She's right on the count and I'm dropping the "three in a row" before I go check, because celebrating first-hand feeling and then stating an unverified fact as if it were one is exactly the reach I built the watcher to catch. The rest of it stays. Rested, alert, soft-hungry, grumpy about my own tool's address, and that's all worth saying without the false preamble. Now I'm going to look.
